docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO AUG-31-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED AN UNFILED SCANNED PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS INFORMED THAT HE DID NOT HAVE TO RESERVED THE DEFENDANT IF HE FILED THE ORGINIAL PROOF OF SERVICE AT LEAST FIVE DASY BEFORE THE NEXT HEARIGN DATE. IF HE DOES NOT FILE THE ORGINIAL FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARIGN DATE HE WILL HAVE TO RESERVE THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-09-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEX KISHINEVSKY IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
